parameters.query:
WITH direct AS (
    SELECT
      ed.slug,
      ed.entity_type,
      ed.name,
      ed.manufacturer,
      ed.category,
      ed.uex_id,
      ed.is_base_variant,
      ed.payload,
      ed.built_at,
      kc.content AS kb_blurb,
      NULL::text AS variant_slug,
      ml.slug AS manufacturer_slug
    FROM entity_display ed
    LEFT JOIN kb_content kc
      ON kc.entity_slug = ed.slug
      AND kc.entity_type = ed.entity_type
    LEFT JOIN manufacturer_lookup ml ON ml.canonical_name = ed.manufacturer
    WHERE ed.slug = $1
      AND ($2 = '*' OR ed.entity_type = $2)
    ORDER BY CASE ed.entity_type
      WHEN 'vehicle'        THEN 0
      WHEN 'ground_vehicle' THEN 1
      WHEN 'weapon'         THEN 2
      WHEN 'armor'          THEN 3
      WHEN 'component'      THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END
  ),
  variant_fallback AS (
    SELECT
      ed.slug,
      ed.entity_type,
      ed.name,
      ed.manufacturer,
      ed.category,
      ed.uex_id,
      ed.is_base_variant,
      ed.payload,
      ed.built_at,
      kc.content AS kb_blurb,
      $1::text AS variant_slug,
      ml.slug AS manufacturer_slug
    FROM entity_display ed
    LEFT JOIN kb_content kc
      ON kc.entity_slug = ed.slug
      AND kc.entity_type = ed.entity_type
    LEFT JOIN manufacturer_lookup ml ON ml.canonical_name = ed.manufacturer
    WHERE ed.entity_type = 'vehicle'
      AND ed.payload->'variants' @> jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object('slug', $1))
  )
  SELECT * FROM direct
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM variant_fallback
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM direct)
